summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Rack&Roll Cafe after 4 requested changes. Fixed critical syntax error in Footer.js. All major requirements verified: address updated to Kanpur, Get Directions button working with correct Google Maps link, WhatsApp removed, hero image alt text cleared, INR pricing maintained, and email integration implemented (though RESEND_API_KEY not configured).

minor_issues.impact: Email notifications fail silently but booking creation still succeeds

fixed_issues.issue: Syntax error - missing closing brace in SocialIcon function
fixed_issues.fix_applied: Added missing closing brace on line 142

passed_tests: Footer shows updated address: 'Rack&Roll Cafe, NRI City, Near Intown Myra, Kanpur'
Old address '123 Gaming Boulevard' completely removed from footer
Get Directions button has correct href='https://maps.app.goo.gl/9ireFo9o6A3oThB37' and target='_blank'
WhatsApp icon/link completely removed from footer social links (only Instagram and Facebook remain)
Hero image alt text is empty (no longer says 'pool table atmosphere')
Phone number 9260940347 correctly displayed in footer
Backend /api/bookings endpoint working and creates bookings with activities array
Backend has email sending integrated via Resend (send_booking_email function present)
Multi-activity booking selection working (Snooker x1, PS5 x1)
Booking form fields accepting input correctly
Calendar component displaying and navigating months
Booking availability endpoint returning slot data

success_percentage.frontend: 100% (all UI features and integrations working after syntax fix)

action_item_for_main_agent: Configure RESEND_API_KEY in backend/.env file to enable email notifications. All other requirements have been successfully implemented and verified.
